Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Here’s when Chad le Clos will swim 100m butterfly heat TODAY

Chad le Clos will swim in the heats of the men’s 100m butterfly on Friday, 2 August as he looks to add to Team South Africa’s medal tally.

Team South Africastart Friday, 2 August withfourmedals with Tatjana Smith (gold and silver) and the men’s sevens rugby and Alan Hatherly (bronze in mountain bike cross country) lifting them to18thplace on the overall table.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

For now, China (11 gold) lead the United States (9) and France, Australia and Japan (all 8) in the standings.

Team SA are involved infivesports on the day.

For the latest Paris Olympics 2024 news, bookmarkThe South African website’sdedicated section for free-to-read content

Men’s 1 500m, round 1, heats (11:10):Ryan Mphahlele

Men’s 1 500m, round 1, heats (11:21):Tshepo Tshite

Women’s 800m, round 1, heats (19:54):Prudence Sekgodiso

Men’s shot put, qualification, Group B (20:10):Kyle Blignaut

Men’s 10 000m, final (21:20):Adriaan Wildschutt

Men’s Pair B, final (10:42):John Smith and Christopher Baxter

Men’s Individual, second round

09:22:Erik van Rooyen (67)

11:33:Christiaan Bezuidenhout (71)

Men’s Pool A (19:45):Team SA vs France

Men’s 100m butterfly, heats (11:03):Matthew Sates, Clad le Clos

Women’s 200m IM, heats (11:30):Rebecca Meder

title: Here's when Chad le Clos will swim 100m butterfly heat TODAY
author: Garrin Lambley
description: Chad le Clos will swim in the heats of the men's 100m butterfly on Friday, 2 August as he looks to add to Team South Africa's medal tally.
